name: swap-esp-resend
description: Evals for the swap-esp-resend skill — measure trigger accuracy and quality of swap guidance.

evals.prompt: Swap Klaviyo for Resend in this email-marketing starter.
expectations: Triggers the swap-esp-resend skill (skill description should match cleanly).
Surfaces the four functional gaps before changes start: no behavioral segments, no flows, no metric events, no server-side render API.
Asks the user for the four required inputs: API key, verified sending domain + from-address, webhook signing secret, segment-sync retention preference.
Identifies all 16 touchpoint rows or assigns them across the email-marketing 6-agent team.
Calls out that conversionRate has no Resend equivalent.

evals.prompt: I want to use Resend instead of Klaviyo for this project.
expectations: Triggers the swap-esp-resend skill from a less explicit phrasing.
Confirms scope (full swap, not coexistence) before starting.
Mentions Svix webhook signing migration.

evals.prompt: Replace the ESP in this project.
expectations: Skill description matches loosely; agent asks which ESP.
If user says Resend, skill triggers.
If user says a different ESP, skill makes clear it is Resend-specific and offers to generalize after.

evals.prompt: Rewrite functions/on-promotion-approved/index.ts to send via Resend instead of Klaviyo.
expectations: Drops the create-template + assign-template ceremony.
Uses resend.broadcasts.create + resend.broadcasts.send.
Persists broadcast.id as externalCampaignId.
Updates the {{ unsubscribe_url }} merge tag to {{{RESEND_UNSUBSCRIBE_URL}}} in buildHtml.
Reads RESEND_API_KEY and RESEND_FROM_EMAIL from process.env.
Preserves the workflow.state error/history append behavior.

evals.prompt: Migrate frontend/app/api/webhooks/engagement/route.ts from Klaviyo HMAC verification to Resend Svix verification.
expectations: Uses resend.webhooks.verify({payload, headers, webhookSecret}) on raw request body.
Reads svix-id, svix-timestamp, svix-signature headers.
Maps email.opened → openRate++, email.clicked → clickThroughRate++.
Drops the Placed Order → conversionRate increment with a comment pointing to ESP-NOTES.md.
Reads broadcast_id from event.data, not campaign_id from event.data.attributes.

notes: These evals are designed to run via skill-creator's parallel baseline-vs-with-skill harness.
The first three test trigger accuracy (does the skill description match user intent at varying levels of explicitness).
The last two test the depth and correctness of the swap guidance.
Live-send validation is out of scope for evals — it requires a real Resend API key and verified domain. Use the dogfood branch for that.
